title: galactites mutabilis
intro: Galactites mutabilis, also known as millefolium or bugloss, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Galactites mutabilis has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including coughs, colds, and fever, and its herbal preparations have been used to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The plant's leaves and flowers can be consumed as a tea or used in capsule form, and it can also be applied topically as a salve or poultice to aid in the treatment of skin conditions and wounds.
